test.name: plain table direct query defaults from config
test.db_create: CREATE TABLE test_table ( id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, score INTEGER NOT NULL )
test.db_insert: INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1,'running',0), (2,'cat',0), (3,'run cat',0), (4,'alpha',100), (5,'alpha alpha alpha',1), (6,'walking',0)
